understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver selectable pieces onto all goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously to achieve WIN for each level, progressing through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces are selected and moved by clicking target positions; movement succeeds if the path is clear, otherwise it's blocked/no effect. Clicking alternates piece position between valid spots like [9,21] and [18,21]. Obstacles/walls block movement. No observed pushing. Multiple clicks on blocked/invalid targets waste steps without repositioning. Step budget is finite per level.
